title: Xaero's World Map: Synchronized
description: Synchronizes world map data between players with Xaero's World Map.
body:
![xaero's world map: synchronized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fefc30ec93d31f0b33b4fd5fed79d0fb544c04f7_0.webp) ![the mod is still in alpha, make backups before use!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b453991af7ffd0dda064450b60c9e4b64d88c4b_0.webp)
This mod adds world map syncronization between players, designed for SMPs Requires [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and currently works only on **dedicated servers**
The map data is saved on the server, in the `.xaerosync` folder [github](https://github.com/5w14/xaeros-world-map-synchronized) / [discord](https://discord.gg/VAC7ZMTuPU) / [ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/fw14)
